items.excerpt: Polygonflow has released Dash 1.12 for Unreal Engine 5, adding scene-layout tools - Place in Grid, Place in Circle, and Vertical Stacking - plus scattering-toolset updates for faster world-building.
Game developers argue that 'AI slop' has become a harmful insult applied indiscriminately and without evidence, reflecting deepening tension over AI's role in creative work.
Builder.io argues AI is changing who can build software: the fastest teams run agents inside their real systems, removing design-to-engineering handoff bottlenecks.
Meta researchers report improved thought-to-text decoding, moving their brain-computer interface a step closer to silent, hands-free text input for spatial computing.
